About

About Da Kine

I've always been drawn to homes with a sense of place. What makes a home feel special is not just how it looks — it's how it lives.

Years of working in design and restoration shape every decision: how a kitchen flows, where things are placed, what makes a space feel calm rather than chaotic.

— Adrian Dady, Founder

Services

The Practice.

Three ways we work. Always with respect for what is already there.

i.

Full Restoration

Complete transformations that respect the original structure and intent of the home.

ii.

Design Direction

Material, layout, and aesthetic decisions that guide the project from beginning to end.

iii.

Project Oversight

Ensuring the final result reflects the original vision, down to the smallest details.

— Our Process · Four Stages —
i.

Listen

Understand the home and how you want to live in it.

ii.

Plan

An approach that respects what exists.

iii.

Execute

Careful work, on a clear timeline.

iv.

Refine

Make sure everything feels right.

Studio

Let's talk.

A small practice. A limited number of projects each year. Tell us a little about the home.
